test_name: 007. Notes on A Part time Society

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位刚退休的男士打电话给一个兼职社团，询问会员资格和活动内容。
content.en_text: You will hear a man who has just retired, telephoning a part-time society to ask about membership and activities.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第1至第5题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: You will see there is an example that has been done for you. On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: Staff：你好，这里是 Leighton Society。有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Staff: Hello, this is the Leighton Society. How can I help?

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，你好。我打电话是因为我想成为你们社团的会员。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, hello. I'm just phoning you because I'm interested in becoming a member of your society.

content.cn_text: 我想问问你能不能给我更多信息。
content.en_text: And I was wondering if you could give me some more information.

content.cn_text: 社团名称是 Leighton，所以空格中已经填入 Leighton。
content.en_text: The name of the society is Leighton, so Leighton has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在正式开始。你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会播放第二遍。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin. You should answer the questions as you listen, because you will not hear the recording a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第5题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: Staff：你好，这里是 Leighton Society。有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Staff: Hello, this is the Leighton Society. How can I help?

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，你好。我打电话是因为我想成为你们社团的会员。我想问问你能不能给我更多信息。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, hello. I'm just phoning you because I'm interested in becoming a member of your society. And I was wondering if you could give me some more information.

content.cn_text: Staff：当然可以，您想了解什么？
content.en_text: Staff: Of course, what would you like to know?

content.cn_text: Caller：首先，我想知道你们在哪里举行社团会议。因为我现在行动不太方便，所以想找一个从我家步行就能到的地方。
content.en_text: Caller: Well, first of all, I'd like to know where you hold the club meetings. As I'm not very mobile anymore, and I'm looking for somewhere that's within walking distance of my house.

content.cn_text: 你们还在旧船屋那边吗？
content.en_text: Are you still down at the old boat house?

content.cn_text: Staff：不，我们前段时间已经搬离那里了。现在会议在club house举行。
content.en_text: Staff: No, we moved away from there a while ago. Meetings are now held at the club house.

content.cn_text: Caller：太好了。那里离我只有五分钟路程。你们要求会员具备什么技能或经验吗？
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, brilliant. That's only five minutes from me. Do you require members to have any skills or experience?

content.cn_text: Staff：不需要经验。我们有很多女性歌手和女演员，但能出演男性角色的男士不多。
content.en_text: Staff: No, there was no experience required. We have plenty of female singers and actresses, but we don't have many men who can play the male roles.

content.cn_text: 我们正在努力解决这个问题，尤其希望招募男性演员和歌手。
content.en_text: We are looking to resolve this, and are especially interested in recruiting male actors and singers.

content.cn_text: Caller：我从没专业唱过歌，但我很感兴趣，而且别人说我有天赋，所以我觉得这会很适合我。
content.en_text: Caller: I've never sung professionally, but I'm very keen on it, and I've been told that I'm talented, so I think this would be a good fit.

content.cn_text: 你们会安排大巴送会员去剧院排练吗？
content.en_text: Do you organise coaches to transport members to practice at the theatre?

content.cn_text: Staff：很遗憾，社团目前没有足够资金来安排交通，不过这是我们正在努力实现的目标。
content.en_text: Staff: Unfortunately, the club does not have sufficient funds to organise transportation, though this is something we are working towards.

content.cn_text: 我们目前正在寻找会开车的会员，这样就可以组织拼车。
content.en_text: We are currently looking for members who can drive so that we can organise car sharing.

content.cn_text: 能开车接送他人的会员，当然会获得汽油费补偿。
content.en_text: Members who are able to shuttle people in their cars will obviously be compensated for their petrol usage.

content.cn_text: Caller：我不会开车，但我愿意出一些钱来使用接送服务。
content.en_text: Caller: I don't drive, but I'll be happy to contribute some money in order to use the shuttle services.

content.cn_text: Staff：可以，这没问题。您知道会议什么时候举行吗？
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, that is no problem. Are you aware of when the meetings take place?

content.cn_text: Caller：不知道，我在你们网站上没找到会议时间。
content.en_text: Caller: No, I couldn't find the meeting times on your website.

content.cn_text: Staff：我们每周星期二晚上6点到8点举行会议。
content.en_text: Staff: We hold meetings from 6 to 8pm every Tuesday.

content.cn_text: Caller：啊，那太好了。我每周星期三去辩论俱乐部，所以很高兴它们不在同一天晚上，这样我两个都能参加。
content.en_text: Caller: Ah, that's lucky. I go to a debating club every Wednesday, so I'm glad that it's on a different night so I can attend both.

content.cn_text: 你们全年开放吗？
content.en_text: Do you operate year round?

content.cn_text: Staff：我们过去会在十二月圣诞期间关闭，但后来发现很多会员希望这段时间继续练习。
content.en_text: Staff: We used to close during December for the Christmas period, but we found that a lot of members wanted to continue their practices during this time.

content.cn_text: 我们一年中大部分时间都开放，不过我们确实会在八月关闭，因为天气太热，无法舒适地练习。
content.en_text: We operate for most of the year, but we do, however, close for August because the weather gets so hot that we are unable to practice comfortably.

content.cn_text: 等我们有足够资金运行空调时，这一点可能会改变。
content.en_text: This may change when we have enough funds to operate the air conditioning.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第6至第10题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第6至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: Caller：好的，我还想问一下会员费是多少，以及会员费包含什么。
content.en_text: Caller: OK, I also wanted to ask how much the membership fee is and what is included with it.

content.cn_text: Staff：我们的会员费不贵，而且包含很多福利，绝对物有所值。
content.en_text: Staff: Our membership fee is inexpensive and it includes many benefits that certainly make the costs worth it.

content.cn_text: 比如，我们会举办年度活动，会员可以彼此见面，并聊一些共同感兴趣的话题。
content.en_text: For example, we hold an annual event where members can meet each other and converse about topics that they have in common.

content.cn_text: 我们发现这个活动非常受欢迎，因为晚餐真的很棒，而且包含在会员费里。
content.en_text: We find that this is very popular as the dinner is truly superb and included with your membership fee.

content.cn_text: Caller：哇，听起来很棒。那会员费是多少？
content.en_text: Caller: Wow, that sounds great. And how much does membership cost?

content.cn_text: Staff：我们有几种会员费标准，取决于您的年龄和情况。
content.en_text: Staff: We have a couple of membership rates depending on your age and situation.

content.cn_text: 30岁以下的在职会员费用是40英镑，30到60岁的会员费用是60英镑。您属于哪一类？
content.en_text: For employed members under the age of 30, the fee is £40 while it costs £60 for members aged between 30 and 60, which of these categories do you fit into?

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，我两类都不属于。我65岁，已经退休了，所以不再工作。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, I don't fit into either of those. I'm 65 years old and retired so I'm no longer employed.

content.cn_text: Staff：完全没问题。您符合最低会员费25英镑的条件，这适用于失业或退休的人。
content.en_text: Staff: That's no problem at all. You qualify for the lowest price membership fee of £25, which applies to those who are either unemployed or retired.

content.cn_text: Caller：哇，真的很便宜。我在想能不能带我孙子一起来参加一些练习，他的会员费是多少？他14岁。
content.en_text: Caller: Wow, that's really affordable. I was thinking of bringing my grandson along to some of the practices, so what would the membership cost for him? He's 14.

content.cn_text: Staff：恐怕这个社团只面向成年人。也就是说，我们不允许16岁及以下的人加入。不过他两年后可以加入。
content.en_text: Staff: I'm afraid that the club is for adults only. That is to say, we don't allow members who are aged 16 and under. He is welcome to join in two years time though.

content.cn_text: Caller：哦，真可惜。我想我可以等等，到时候给他买会员作为生日礼物。
content.en_text: Caller: Oh, that's a shame. I guess I can wait and buy him a membership for his birthday present.

content.cn_text: Staff：是的，这主意不错。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, what a good idea.

content.cn_text: Caller：我本来希望能带他一起去，这样我在那里就有人聊天。我担心自己和其他会员没有共同话题。
content.en_text: Caller: I was hoping I could bring him with me so I have someone there to talk to and worried that I won't have anything in common with the other members.

content.cn_text: Staff：我相信您会很快融入的。我们的会员都很友好，而且对文化和音乐感兴趣。
content.en_text: Staff: I'm sure you'll fit in just fine. All our members are very friendly and interested in culture and music.

content.cn_text: 参与其中的大多数人都是现代作家，他们想寻找新的经历写进书里。
content.en_text: Most of the people involved are modern authors looking for new experiences to write about in their books.

content.cn_text: 您可以读一些他们的书，这样就有话题可以和他们聊。
content.en_text: You could read some of their books so you have something to discuss with them.

content.cn_text: Caller：这是个好建议。我一定会这么做。我真的很期待参加年度晚餐，这样可以认识新朋友，也希望能交到朋友。
content.en_text: Caller: That's a good suggestion. I'll definitely do that. I'm really looking forward to attending the annual dinner, so I can meet new people and hopefully make some friends.

content.cn_text: Staff：当然。大家都会度过一个很棒的夜晚，而且这完全是慈善活动，因为这次活动筹集的所有钱都会捐给儿童医院，用于购买玩具和衣物。
content.en_text: Staff: Absolutely. Everyone has a great night and it's all for charity as all of the money raised from this event is donated to the children's hospital so they can buy toys and clothes.

content.cn_text: Caller：哇，真是很有意义的事业。那我一定会很快过去办理会员。谢谢你的帮助。
content.en_text: Caller: Wow, what a great cause. Well, I will definitely be popping in soon to arrange my membership. Thank you for all of your help.

content.cn_text: Staff：完全没问题。再见。
content.en_text: Staff: No problem at all. Goodbye.

content.cn_text: Caller：再见。
content.en_text: Caller: Bye.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section one. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 请等待答案。
content.en_text: Please wait for the answers.

groups.desc:
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Location: 1. ________ house
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题空格为 “______ house”，原文说现在在 “club” house，所以答案是 club。old boat house 是旧地点，为干扰信息。

items.title: Want: 2. ________ actors and singers (no experience required)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问想要什么样的 actors and singers，原文明确说 recruiting male actors and singers。

items.title: Transportation: shuttle services (need someone who is able to 3. ________ )
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 shuttle services 需要 someone who is able to ______，原文说 members who can drive，所以答案是 drive。petrol 是补偿内容，不是答案。

items.title: Meeting time: 6:00–8:00 pm every 4. ________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 meeting time 是 every ______，原文说 every Tuesday。Wednesday 是他参加另一个 debating club 的时间，是干扰。

items.title: Close time: during 5. ________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 close time，原文先说过去 December 关闭，但现在关闭时间是 August。

items.title: Membership fee (including 6. ________.)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 membership fee 包含什么，原文说 the dinner is included with your membership fee。

items.title: £7. ________ for retired or unemployed members (over 60 years of age)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 retired or unemployed members 的费用，原文说 lowest price membership fee of £25，所以答案是 25。£40 和 £60 是其他类别的价格。
答案解析：第8题问 minimum joining age，答案表给出 16。原文定位在 “aged 16 and under” 以及 “14岁孙子两年后可加入”。

items.title: 9. ________ authors looking for new experiences to write about in their books
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 most members are ______ authors，原文对应 modern authors。

items.title: The children’s 10. ______ will get the money raised by the annual dinner.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 children’s ______ 会得到 annual dinner 筹集的钱，原文说 donated to the children’s hospital。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Notes on A Part time Society
Example
Name of society: Leighton
• Location: $1$ house
• Want: $2$ actors and singers (no experience required)
• Transportation: shuttle services (need someone who is able to $3$ )
• Meeting time: 6:00–8:00 pm every $4$.
• Close time: during $5$.
Membership fee (including $6$.)
• £40 for employed members (under 30 years of age)
• £60 for employed members (30–60 years of age)
• £$7$ for retired or unemployed members (over 60 years of age)
Minimum joining age
• $8$
Most members are
• Friendly
• fond of culture and music
• $9$ authors looking for new experiences to write about in their books
Charity
The children’s $10$ will get the money raised by the annual dinner.

source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
